_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of encryption algorithms (e.g., Internet Protocol Security [IPSEC], Advanced Encryption Standard [AES], Generic Routing Encapsulation [GRE], Internet Key Exchange [IKE], Message Digest Algorithm [MD5], Secure Hash Algorithm [SHA], Triple Data Encryption Standard [3DES]).
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of data platform security controls, including network isolation, encryption at rest and in transit, identity and access management, and audit logging.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI DA domain. DA-K-012 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: TF-K-013 (TF, cosine: 0.526), DQ-K-014 (DQ, cosine: 0.476).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.2/10 (raw 0.517). Shared vocabulary: [data, encryption, knowledge, security]. DCWF-only terms [3des, advanced, aes, algorithm, algorithms, digest] vs WIDAI-only terms [access, audit, controls, identity, isolation, logging] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.826 (P=0.793, R=0.863). R exceeds P by 0.070 — the WIDAI KSA's 22 words are well-captured by the DCWF element's 34 words, but the DCWF element contains broader scope not fully reflected in the matched WIDAI KSA.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.9%). "Knowledge of encryption algorithms (e.g., Internet Protocol Security [IPSEC], Ad" and "Knowledge of data platform security controls, including network isolation, encry" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.550 ≈ STS 0.517 (gap 0.033). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [data, encryption, knowledge, security] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 11.1%. Shared tokens: [data, encryption, knowledge, security]. DCWF-only: [3des, advanced, aes, algorithm, algorithms, digest]. WIDAI-only: [access, audit, controls, identity, isolation, logging].

signals.detail: STS 0.517 barely clears classification threshold for Superset of. This match is fragile and may indicate insufficient KSA coverage for this competency area.
